news.title:
NBFCs expected to end FY26 strong with 13% AUM growth, driven by vehicle finance demand and MFI recovery.
Bajaj Finance is a top pick; Aditya Birla Capital, LT Finance, and affordable housing players show strong prospects despite FY27 challenges.
news.summary:
NBFCs expected to end FY26 strong with 13% AUM growth, driven by vehicle finance demand and MFI recovery.
Bajaj Finance is a top pick; Aditya Birla Capital, LT Finance, and affordable housing players show strong prospects despite FY27 challenges.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital's valuation shifted from fair to expensive, reflecting strong price gains.
The article analyzes valuation metrics, historical averages, and peer comparisons for NBFC investors.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital's valuation shifted from fair to expensive, reflecting strong price gains.
The article analyzes valuation metrics, historical averages, and peer comparisons for NBFC investors.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital's board approved INR 2,750 crore investment in its housing finance arm.
Funding from Indriya Limited, an Advent International entity, received CCI approval on April 7, 2026.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital's board approved INR 2,750 crore investment in its housing finance arm.
Funding from Indriya Limited, an Advent International entity, received CCI approval on April 7, 2026.

news.title:
India Ratings affirms Aditya Birla Capital's long-term issuer rating at IND AAA with Stable Outlook.
Various instruments rated IND AAA Stable; total rated amount rises from Rs.1,262.8M to Rs.1,462.8M.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirms Aditya Birla Capital's long-term issuer rating at IND AAA with Stable Outlook.
Various instruments rated IND AAA Stable; total rated amount rises from Rs.1,262.8M to Rs.1,462.8M.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights NBFCs like Shriram Finance, PNB Housing Finance, L&T Finance, and Aditya Birla Capital as top picks.
Brokerage expects growth in net interest income, pre-provision operating profit, and PAT for NBFCs ahead of Q4 results.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights NBFCs like Shriram Finance, PNB Housing Finance, L&T Finance, and Aditya Birla Capital as top picks.
Brokerage expects growth in net interest income, pre-provision operating profit, and PAT for NBFCs ahead of Q4 results.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital approved merger of subsidiaries, sanctioned by Regional Director on 31 March 2026.
Amalgamation involves Aditya Birla Stressed Asset AMC and Aditya Birla Financial Shared Services.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital approved merger of subsidiaries, sanctioned by Regional Director on 31 March 2026.
Amalgamation involves Aditya Birla Stressed Asset AMC and Aditya Birla Financial Shared Services.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital invested Rs. 53 Cr in ABCDL via rights issue to support growth.
The investment does not impact Aditya Birla Capital's shareholding in ABCDL.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital invested Rs. 53 Cr in ABCDL via rights issue to support growth.
The investment does not impact Aditya Birla Capital's shareholding in ABCDL.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital Ltd confirmed interest payment of Rs. 505.2 lakh for ABCL NCD Series F3 FY 2025-26.
The payment was made on the due date, 24-03-2026, with no delays or changes in payment frequency.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital Ltd confirmed interest payment of Rs. 505.2 lakh for ABCL NCD Series F3 FY 2025-26.
The payment was made on the due date, 24-03-2026, with no delays or changes in payment frequency.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital issued 25,000 unsecured rated taxable NCDs worth ₹250 crore.
Each debenture has a face value of ₹1 lakh, 8.03% coupon, maturing May 4, 2035.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital issued 25,000 unsecured rated taxable NCDs worth ₹250 crore.
Each debenture has a face value of ₹1 lakh, 8.03% coupon, maturing May 4, 2035.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital participated in Analyst/Investor meets on 16 Mar 2026.
Presentation discussed uploaded on their website; no sensitive info shared.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital participated in Analyst/Investor meets on 16 Mar 2026.
Presentation discussed uploaded on their website; no sensitive info shared.

news.title:
Kotak initiates Buy on Aditya Birla Capital with ₹390 TP, citing strong growth in ₹1.5 tn NBFC AUM.
HFC projects ~51% CAGR FY24–FY26E with ₹422 bn AUM; non-lending business supports profitability.
news.summary:
Kotak initiates Buy on Aditya Birla Capital with ₹390 TP, citing strong growth in ₹1.5 tn NBFC AUM.
HFC projects ~51% CAGR FY24–FY26E with ₹422 bn AUM; non-lending business supports profitability.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted Rs. 755 cr NCDs via private placement.
Tenors range 2.5-10 years, coupons vary from 7.1% to 9.15%.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted Rs. 755 cr NCDs via private placement.
Tenors range 2.5-10 years, coupons vary from 7.1% to 9.15%.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital invests Rs. 749.9 crore in Aditya Birla Housing Finance via rights shares.
The investment aims to support growth and enhance leverage ratio for the subsidiary.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital invests Rs. 749.9 crore in Aditya Birla Housing Finance via rights shares.
The investment aims to support growth and enhance leverage ratio for the subsidiary.

news.title:
ABSLI faced a tax demand of ₹464.81 cr for AY 21-22, later nullified.
ITAT remanded the case; AO approved ABSLI's claim on Feb 28, 2026.
news.summary:
ABSLI faced a tax demand of ₹464.81 cr for AY 21-22, later nullified.

news.title: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 976 shares of Aditya Birla Capital at avg price of 345.3.
news.summary: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 976 shares of Aditya Birla Capital at avg price of 345.3.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted 163 unsecured, listed, taxable perpetual debentures worth Rs. 163 crore.
Debentures have a face value of Rs. 1 crore each, 8.4% p.a. coupon rate, annual interest paid every Feb 27.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted 163 unsecured, listed, taxable perpetual debentures worth Rs. 163 crore.
Debentures have a face value of Rs. 1 crore each, 8.4% p.a. coupon rate, annual interest paid every Feb 27.

news.title:
India Ratings affirms IND AAA Stable for Aditya Birla Sun Life Insurance's Rs. 1,300 crore subordinated debts.
Positive credit perception driven by stable outlooks for Aditya Birla Capital Ltd.
news.summary:

news.title:

Presentation discussed in meetings is available on www.adityabirlacapital.com; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.
